heading: Termination of sanctions and other measures
label: 9252 Termination of sanctions and other measures
notes: References in TextSubchapter I, II, or III (or any amendment made by such subchapters), referred to in subsec. (a), was in the original “title I, II, or III (or any amendment made by such titles)”, meaning titles I, II, and III of , , , 101, 112. Titles I and III are classified principally to subchapters I and III, respectively, of this chapter. Title II is classified generally to subchapter II of this chapter. children.text: met the requirements set forth in ; andsection 9251 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: completely, verifiably, and irreversibly dismantling all of its nuclear, chemical, biological, and radiological weapons programs, including all programs for the development of systems designed in whole or in part for the delivery of such weapons;

children.label: B
children.text: releasing all political prisoners, including the citizens of North Korea detained in North Korea’s political prison camps;

children.label: C
children.text: ceasing its censorship of peaceful political activity;

children.label: D
children.text: establishing an open, transparent, and representative society; and

children.label: i
children.text: abducted or unlawfully held captive by the Government of North Korea; or

children.label: ii
children.text: detained in violation of the Agreement Concerning a Military Armistice in Korea, signed at Panmunjom (commonly referred to as the “Korean War Armistice Agreement”).July 27, 1953
